name: Nextdoor Holdings, Inc.
description: Nextdoor Holdings, Inc. operates a hyperlocal social networking platform designed to connect neighbors, businesses, and public agencies. Founded in 2008 and headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company provides a digital space for communities to share local news, organize events, exchange goods, and engage in relevant discussions. By fostering connections within neighborhoods, Nextdoor aims to build stronger, safer, and more informed communities. The platform is available in multiple countries, serving as a central hub for local information and services, and is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol KIND.
